segments.text: Heavy lands the feint into the directional airdodge!
segments.original_text: ヘビーのフェイントからの移動回避

segments.text: Kanatoko connects and takes the first stock!
segments.original_text: カナトコ通してストック先制

full_text: Heavy lands the feint into the directional airdodge! And here's the real attack! Kanatoko connects and takes the first stock! Oh! They're chasing them down!
